Implements BLE client operations, including AMS, ANCS, app launch, DIS, PPoGATT, and test services.

## Folders
- **[ams](ams/README.md)**: Implements the Apple Media Service (AMS) client, defines related types and UUIDs, and provides utility functions for BLE communication.
- **[ancs](ancs/README.md)**: ANCS client implementation, app name storage, UUID definitions, data structures, and utility functions for BLE.
- **[app_launch](app_launch/README.md)**: Handles BLE app launch services and defines related functions, types, and UUIDs.
- **[dis](dis/README.md)**: Functions and definitions for BLE Device Information Service (DIS) in kernel_le_client.
- **[ppogatt](ppogatt/README.md)**: Implements and defines the PPoGATT protocol for BLE communication, including session and characteristic management.
- **[test](test/README.md)**: Defines test characteristics, UUIDs, and functions for handling BLE client service events.

## Files
- **[kernel_le_client.c](kernel_le_client.c.md)**: Manages Bluetooth Low Energy (BLE) client operations, including GATT service discovery and connection handling.
- **[kernel_le_client.h](kernel_le_client.h.md)**: Handles BLE gateway connections to bootstrap PPoGATT, ANCS, and "Service Changed" modules.
